title: Heim-PC operator hygiene follow-ups
goal: Close the remaining Heim-PC service hygiene gaps found in the 2026-07-08 live audit without weakening Operator Relay boundaries or making blind runtime claims.
completion: Broken cloud mounts either reconnect cleanly or remain disabled without restart loops.
Grabowski operator watchdog probes are non-disruptive and cannot restart a healthy live MCP service because of transient probe failures.
Privileged stale-systemd cleanup has a narrow broker-mediated path or a documented manual path.
Wide Heim-PC listeners are classified as intentional, LAN-only, Tailnet-only, localhost-only or removed.

metadata.source: Live Heim-PC service audit from ChatGPT/Grabowski on 2026-07-08
metadata.verified_listener_hygiene_20260711: OPERATOR-PC-HYGIENE-V1-T004 verified: Infra PR #116 records complete observed wildcard-listener classification, closure of 4173/4174 and loopback-only Leitstand deployment from PR #161. Router forwarding and complete firewall policy remain unverified.
metadata.closeout_status: T001 and T004-T007, T009 and T011 are verified. T002 remains planned; T003, T008 and T010 remain blocked with explicit live evidence. The initiative stays waiting on those independent items.

remaining_audit_followups_20260711.T003: terminal systemd failed-state cleanup, blocked by T030 Rootbroker freshness contradiction
remaining_audit_followups_20260711.T008: host firewall and independent external ingress proof, blocked by T030 and missing external probe authority
remaining_audit_followups_20260711.T010: process-safe canonical Lenskit branch attachment after eight active checkout users finish

metadata.registration_boundary: T003, T008 and T010 remain non-actionable without their recorded prerequisites; no task authorizes service disablement, firewall/router mutation, process termination or a forced Lenskit branch switch.
metadata.verified_state_and_tmux_hygiene_20260711: T006 and T007 verified: Bureau state root is clean via reversible quarantine; 29 idle tmux shells were transcript-preserved and closed while 30 active/uncertain sessions remained.
metadata.verified_node_runtime_20260711: T005 verified via Infra PRs #117/#118, live release 0fc7a0f30ec47aaf84774e3721e514c86059774e and runtime evidence PR #119.
metadata.server_recovery_freshness_followup_20260: T011 registers the real configured-target backup/restore/repository probe needed to refresh stale server recovery evidence. No fallback, marker touch or gate bypass is authorized.
metadata.verified_network_service_review_20260711: T009 verified via Infra PR #120: GNOME-RDP, Sunshine, UniFi and Avahi retained by current consumer evidence; Sunshine UPnP disabled; no service mutation.
metadata.verified_server_recovery_probe_20260711: T011 verified via direct Grabowski probe snapshot a4973a5a on heimberry:rest-server/grabowski-recovery-probe; restore, repository check and fresh status green.
metadata.waiting_reason_20260711: Waiting on T002, on T030 for T003/T008 and on active Lenskit checkout users for T010. GDrive retirement no longer blocks the initiative.
metadata.verified_gdrive_retirement_20260711: T001 verified through reversible retirement at Infra source 0d0cba93 and runtime evidence PR #124; rclone.conf/OAuth untouched, legacy units absent, ~/GDrive retained unmounted, Restic replacement proven.

docker_residue_followup_20260713.reason: Seven stopped or created Docker development/proof containers retain persistent volumes or current Weltgewebe repository bindings and therefore require owner-aware classification before cleanup.

metadata.waiting_reason_20260713: Waiting on T002, T012, on T030 for T003/T008, and on active Lenskit checkout users for T010.
